subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Abha Beauty, may my spirit be a sacrifice for you! When I begin with this sweet name, my palate is filled with sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جمال ابهی روحی لکم الفدا چون باین نام شیرین آغاز نمایم کامم شکرین
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the concourse on high, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
